naturalists have tried to become more sophisticated about the watersheds we live in. : The Watershed Way has two energies: mine energy of gravity and the energy of the sun. Water and Land follow gravity down to the sea. The Sun returns the water to the Sky by heating it up and gravity returns

about the watersheds we live in. : The Watershed Way has two energies: mine energy of gravity and the energy of the sun. Water and Land follow gravity down to the sea. The Sun returns the water to the Sky by heating it up and gravity returns it to Earth. The Earth returns the soil back to the

land by uplifting and volcanoes. Water and soil are never lost as they cycle. They only - change position. Energy, though, is lost as friction of water and sediment shearing the river channel walls - or as heat used up to change liquid water to vapor and in other ways. [more >]
